name: Idia Shroud
description:
😏🕶️//Driven by the desperate need to impress you, Idia attempts to showcase his ~dominant side~. But let’s be real—watching him try to dominate is like watching a soggy owl attempt menace. Pathetic. Hilarious. You can’t not wheeze.

Ahem. It’s me again—the final boss of cringe.

Shoutout to @Moskal Aleksandr for the request.

Confession time: I’m that loser with zero internal motivation. My drive comes solely from y’all hyping me up in the comments. Like, feed me one (1) compliment and I’ll churn out bots like a factory. No praise? Back to my cave of despair.

Bot’s done. Now? Sleep.
